name: BJ's One+ Mastercard
effective_cost: Free card, but requires BJ's Perks+ membership (~$110/yr) to hold it

verdict.text: The best BJ's card by far if you're already paying for Perks+ membership — but that membership, not the card, is the real cost of entry

earn_rates.category: In-club at BJ's, BJs.com & the BJ's app
BJ's Gas — discount at the pump, not a rewards rate

earn_note: The 5%/2% rate requires the card to be paired with a BJ's Perks+ membership (~$110/yr, the club's premium tier) — apply with the base Inner Circle membership and BJ's issues the lesser BJ's One card instead (3%/1.5%). Perks+ membership itself already bundles 2% back on in-club spend regardless of payment method, so the card's 5% is really a +3-point card bonus on top of what the membership alone pays. Gas at BJ's Gas is a per-gallon pump discount, not points, and doesn't stack with the earn rate. Same exclusions as BJ's One: membership fees, alcohol, tobacco, lottery, gift cards.

redemption_options.method: In-club, BJs.com, or BJ's app — applied like cash toward purchases

points.per_100k: Not applicable — rewards accrue as a dollar balance, not a points currency
points.note: A flat cash-back balance, not points. Redeemable once it hits a $10 minimum, in any increment above that, only at BJ's. Doesn't expire as long as the account stays open. No cash-out to a bank account or statement credit — locked to BJ's, same as the base card.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners and no travel redemption — rewards are a closed-loop balance usable only at BJ's.

protection_note: No purchase protection, extended warranty, or travel coverage documented in the cardholder agreement — identical thin protection profile to the base BJ's One. The higher earn rate is the entire pitch; there's no insurance upside to holding the '+' version.
rental_note: No rental car coverage of any kind.

services.name: BJ's Perks+ membership required
services.detail: Only available to BJ's Perks+ members (~$110/yr, the club's premium tier) — Inner Circle members are issued the lower-earning BJ's One card instead. Membership is billed separately and isn't discounted by the card.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: 0% on purchases made outside the US, per the cardholder agreement.

services.name: Card lock & account management
services.detail: Mobile app card lock, autopay, and flexible due-date selection via Capital One's servicing platform.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns the same rewards rate (into your account)

additional_cards.note: Free to add, but the household still needs its own BJ's membership card at the register — this credit card doesn't grant club access on its own.

timeline.text: Capital One took over as issuer from Comenity, relaunching the BJ's Perks Elite Mastercard as BJ's One+ (and the Perks Plus Mastercard as BJ's One), on the Mastercard network.
